queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the statistical impact of lacking a checking account on credit default probability and its role as a determinant of elevated credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Present employment duration: between 4 and 7 years.
queries.question: Empirical investigation into how an employment duration of four to seven years functions as a mitigating credit risk driver that reduces the determinants of default.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between a checking account balance below zero and its effect as a stabilizing credit risk driver that lowers default likelihood.
